title: Design Heap
description: Design a Min-Heap with push(val), pop() → removes and returns minimum, top() → returns minimum. Implement using an array with index arithmetic.
key_concept: Binary heap in array: parent=(i-1)//2, left=2i+1, right=2i+2. Push: append + bubble up. Pop: swap root with last + bubble down. All O(log n).

hints.L1: Store heap as array. Parent of i is (i-1)//2. Children of i are 2i+1 and 2i+2. Heap property: parent <= children.
hints.L2: push: append to end, bubble up (swap with parent while parent > child). pop: swap root with last element, remove last, bubble down (swap with smaller child).
hints.L3: bubbleDown: while left_child < len: find smaller of two children; if heap[i] <= smaller child: break; swap; i=smaller_child_index
